mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GROUP_MORAK ( group_no, no, group_title, category, user_max, price, area, addr1, addr2, latitude, longitude, start_date, last_date, comment1, comment2, type, img_url1, img_url2, img_url3 ) VALUES ( group_seq.nextval, 1, #{group_title}, #{category}, #{user_max}, #{price}, substr(#{addr1}, 6, 2), #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{comment1}, #{comment2}, #{type}, #{img_url1, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{img_url2, jdbcType=BLOB},#{img_url3, jdbcType=BLOB} )
mapper.select: SELECT group_no, group_title, category, user_max, price, area, comment2, type, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'FMMonth FMDD"일"') AS start_date, img_url1 FROM GROUP_MORAK WHERE type=#{type}
mapper.update: UPDATE GROUP_MORAK SET GROUP_TITLE = #{group_title}, START_DATE = #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, LAST_DATE = #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, USER_MAX = #{user_max}, PRICE = #{price}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, COMMENT1 = #{comment1}, COMMENT2 = #{comment2}, TYPE = #{type}, CATEGORY = #{category}, LATITUDE = #{latitude}, LONGITUDE = #{longitude}, IMG_URL1 = #{img_url1, jdbcType=BLOB},IMG_URL2 = #{img_url2, jdbcType=BLOB}, IMG_URL3 = #{img_url3, jdbcType=BLOB} WHERE group_no = #{group_no}
